name: Wesfarmers Limited
analysis: WES has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$80.4200. Trade idea: entry A$86.2300, stop A$76.8438, target A$114.3886 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
